race.comment: TAKE THE FIELD (2) has joined the Brett Pope barn since his last start effort in November, beaten 2.5L in a commendable performance at Belmont. This shapes as a much easier race for him and his latest trial at Lark Hill was sound. Can make an immediate impact for the new stable. CHANTILLY GIRL (9) stuck on well when fresh last campaign in a much stronger race than this before disappointing in Maiden company before the break. She'll be fitter for two trials coming in and she'll appreciate the drop back in class. Finds the right race today. MY TEA (1) last appeared when he finished seventh over 2200m at Pinjarra Scarpside on March 5. Looks a strong top-three prospect. COCOON GIRL (7) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside, beaten 5.5 lengths. Fitter so a likely improver. DUOPOLY (10) is next best on resumption.
